title: Social Manager
description:
We’re looking for a social manager to join the Manus social team. This role is responsible for finding, surfacing and developing original content for the official Manus social media accounts on Instagram, Facebook, Threads and more.

You are an experienced storyteller, organized, prioritize attention to detail, thrive in a multi-tasking, deadline-driven environment, and possess demonstrated experience with social content creation. You must have experience capturing content in the field, video editing experience, effective communication, and are well-versed in delivering and launching initiatives on time, on budget and on strategy.

Responsibilities

  • Develop original content and assets for social media
  • Collaborate with partners on Marketing and Communications to bring new products and features to life through our social
  • Understand the interests and behaviors of the audience and how to best connect with them and keep them engaged
  • Work collaboratively across the team and communicate effectively
  • Identify, surface and amplify Instagram trends across a diverse spectrum of topics
  • Research and suggest relevant Instagram content and creators for coverage on our social channels

Minimum qualifications

  • 1+ years of experience in a role with an emphasis on creating and sourcing assets for social media
  • A love of making content and being in the weeds with assets
  • An in-depth knowledge, familiarity and experience of working with the Instagram products and publishing content across multiple surfaces including Instagram Reels, Stories, Instagram Feed
  • Experience running projects with multiple stakeholders
  • Experience collaborating with external talent and production partners
  • Experience building working relationships with core and cross-functional teams
  • Demonstrated experience working in content production for an international audience
  • Experience with quick-turn/rapid response communications
  • Experience in trend-spotting and translating trends to social

Preferred qualifications

  • Knowledge of videographers and photographers and photo/video shoot experience
  • Experience working within a department that places priority on visual storytelling
  • Demonstrated experience creating content for an international audience



Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. People who choose to build their careers by building with us at Meta help shape a future that will take us beyond what digital connection makes possible today—beyond the constraints of screens, the limits of distance, and even the rules of physics.
